ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-10-2018 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Final Distribution Or Status Of Administration.
Off Calendar Dec-11-2017 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Final Distribution Or Status Of Administration.
Off Calendar Nov-06-2017 Continued To Dec-11-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Gilbert Jay for Tashi Zouras.

Mr. Jay asked the Court to waive applicability of Local Rule 14.59, stated that this is a small estate (about $100,000.00), that he can file a first and final accounting and that he was informed by James Lassart that the lawsuit against Mr. Zouras is over. Status on filing of a petition for approval of status report or petition for final distribution is continued to December 11, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: J. Chu. Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Sep-21-2016 Continued To Oct-19-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Inventory And Appraisal; Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Aug-23-2016 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Inventory And Appraisal; Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Jul-26-2016 Continued To Aug-23-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gilbert Jay for (executor) Tashi Zouras.

The Court stated that it is looking for an inventory & appraisal and a petition for final distribution. Mr. Jay stated that everything is in the trust with the exception of a small amount of cash, that Bank of America will not release it, that there is a pending lawsuit in which Peter Zouras is named as a defendant, that it is now with the Court of Appeal, that the malpractice carrier has picked up the coverage and that he is not sure when it will be over. The Court stated that the inventory & appraisal could be done off of a statement from Bank of America, that it should have been done within 4 months of the issuance of letters and that it also needs a report on the status of administration filed. The status of filing an inventory & appraisal and petition for final distribution was continued to August 23, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-23-2013 Granted Per Written Order
